Name: bolt_offset
Comments: For backwards compatability for any holes you've already drilled: (V1 use 52.494) ,( V2 [parametric] use 53.25 mm)

Name: flange_count
Comments: Minimum of 2, Maximum of 4. Recommended to keep on 3.

Name: tolerance
Comments: Increase this value if the fit is too tight when twisting closed. Note: This effects the Source Coupling body.
